prompt: Premium supplement social media advertisement, square 1:1 format, vivid blue gradient background from #0055CC (top-left) to #003399 (bottom), with a dramatic bright white-yellow radial sun burst / light flare emanating from top-right corner (#FFFFFF center fading to #FFF8CC then transparent). NO product images generated by AI anywhere. TOP SECTION (full width, top 0%-26%): two lines of bold white uppercase text centered horizontally. Line 1 (top 4%-13%): '¿POR QUÉ EL DOLOR CRÓNICO' in heavy bold white (#FFFFFF) 52px, tight tracking. Line 2 (top 13%-22%): 'NO DESAPARECE CON PASTILLAS?' in heavy bold white (#FFFFFF) 52px. Below the headline (top 22%-26%): thinner white text centered '¿Porque tus articulaciones necesitan recuperarse desde adentro:' 20px regular weight white #F0F0F0. HORIZONTAL THIN WHITE SEPARATOR LINE at y=26%, full width, 1px opacity 30%. LEFT COLUMN (left 0%-50%, top 26%-85%): COMPLETELY EMPTY — only the blue gradient background, no shapes, no boxes, no frames, no objects, pure deep blue gradient #003399. At top-left of left column (left 3%-18%, top 28%-40%): single white circle outline (3px stroke, no fill, transparent interior) diameter about 12% of image, containing two lines of bold white text centered: '30' (28px bold) on first line, 'SOBRES' (18px bold) on second line. RIGHT COLUMN (right 50%-100%, top 26%-85%): three glass-morphism transparent circular bubbles arranged in a triangular layout. Each bubble: semi-transparent white glass effect (rgba 255,255,255,0.15 fill, white 1.5px stroke, soft inner glow), diameter ~22% of image. Bubble positions: TOP-CENTER at (75%, 36%), BOTTOM-LEFT at (60%, 62%), BOTTOM-RIGHT at (85%, 65%). Inside each bubble, bold white uppercase text centered (16px, tight tracking): Bubble 1 text 'REDUCIR LA INFLAMACIÓN DESDE LA RAÍZ'. Bubble 2 text 'CAMINAR SIN DOLOR CADA DÍA'. Bubble 3 text 'DORMIR SIN DESPERTAR DEL DOLOR'. Overlapping the right column bubbles, a silhouette of a female runner/jogger in motion (side profile, mid-stride, raising arms), the silhouette color is deep navy blue #001F6E with slight inner glow, the figure spans from y=30% to y=82% height, positioned center-right. BOTTOM SECTION (full width, y=85%-100%): dark navy bar #001A5C, inside it on the right: small white text 'DISPONIBLE EN' (13px, regular) followed by bold white text 'Immunotec' (18px bold) with small Immunotec Y-logo icon in white beside it. OVERALL: clean, modern, high-contrast pharmaceutical ad style, no clutter, no gradients other than described, no texture.
negative_prompt: product images, bottles, sachets, packets, capsules, pills, any supplement packaging, text errors, blurry text, extra people, realistic faces, shadows on background, brown tones, green tones, orange background, cluttered layout, watermarks, low quality, dark muddy colors, white rectangle boxes, gray boxes, placeholder shapes in product zone
